description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black pole with two ornate, curved lamp arms at different heights, each supporting a downward-facing lantern-style lamp head. The upper section of the pole is adorned with a gold decorative finial and a sculpted gold animal figure, possibly a mythical creature, adding a distinctive ornamental touch. The lamp heads have a classic, domed design with flared edges, and the gold accents are repeated at the base of each lamp arm. The base of the pole is square and robust, suggesting stability for outdoor installation. The overall design blends traditional and decorative elements, making it suitable for upscale urban or park environments. The lamppost is visually striking due to its combination of black and gold colors and its elaborate decorative features.
description: A tall black lamppost with two ornate, curved arms supporting classic lantern-style lamp heads and gold decorative accents, including a sculpted animal figure and finial.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lamp heads, the gold animal figure, and the decorative finial clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the pole and the lamp heads aligned, with minimal visibility of decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the lamp heads and the gold animal figure, with the finial visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pole's profile and lamp heads, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic domed lantern style with flared edges and downward-facing orientation
